title: Souqna — bilingual commerce workspace for Gulf storefronts · Souqna
description: Souqna helps founders launch and operate bilingual Gulf storefronts with the builder, catalogue, orders, payments, apps, and growth work in one place.

headings.text: Four small questions, then your workplace opens.
From a name to the first sale, without splitting your work across tools.
The storefront, back office, and AI assistant stay on one surface.
Quiet, but useful. The real numbers appear as founders open stores.
Start free. Upgrade when the store needs more room.

ctas.text: Start your store - free for two weeks
See it work · شاهد كيف يعمل
